title: Definition of Done Checklist
description: A Definition of Done checklist at story, sprint, phase, or release level, with individual criterion verification records.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase to which this DoD applies

sprint.description: Sprint identifier (e.g. S4-001) or release identifier if applicable

level.description: Level at which this DoD applies

criterion.description: The specific done criterion to be checked

verified_by.description: Person or role who verified this criterion

items.description: Individual criteria in this Definition of Done

status.description: Overall completion status of the DoD checklist

overall_status.description: Summary status derived from individual criterion results

verified_by.description: Person or role who verified the overall DoD completion

verification_date.description: Date the DoD was verified as complete (ISO 8601)

exceptions.description: List of criteria exceptions with justification
